title: Spoingle
body:
![A Spoingle in front of a Jungle biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4190512fa0fdeaf55b7014c35fb5949c5ac1ef1.png)

Tired of wolves, cats, and other _normal_ pets?
# _Then come on down and get yourself a Spoingle!_

They can be tamed with Raw Iron, and you can breed them with cookies! They'll protect you until the very end! 
_BUT WAIT! THERE'S MORE!_
Apart from protecting you and flibbing, Spoingles are ALSO the only tameable mob that can be bucketed!

![A Bucket of Spoingle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9a3a3ebbce90693de3d71bd1749c441f884f263.png)

To obtain one of your own, you can either find it rarely spawning out and about......or dive into an ancient city and hope you get one in a chest.

![Ancient City chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1774a471afe1608dba2f18622392747c40462a61.png)

On top of that, this mod adds WONDERFUL paintings for you to look at to remind you of why God shunted his own creation, fearful of the things they brought about!

![Spoingle paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e40912362961da30e706a68256c2b6b44a746f8.png)
